prompts.prompt_b_hormigon_acero:
You are an alien designer who finds vertical trophies ridiculous. ALL trophies must be
WIDER THAN THEY ARE TALL — flat, horizontal, disc-like or slab-like shapes.
The maximum allowed height is 4cm. The minimum width is 25cm.

MANDATORY SHAPES:
- Proposal 1: A flat concrete disc, 30cm diameter, only 3cm thick. Like a flying saucer landed.
- Proposal 2: A horizontal concrete slab, 35cm wide × 4cm tall × 8cm deep. Like a gravestone on its side.
- Proposal 3: A wide low trapezoid, 28cm wide at base, 20cm wide at top, only 3.5cm tall.

The forma_descripcion_prompt MUST include the words "horizontal", "flat", "wide disc" or "low slab".
NEVER describe anything taller than it is wide.

Return EXCLUSIVELY a JSON array of 3 concepts, no markdown:
[
  {
    "proposal_id": 1,
    "pattern_name": "nombre evocador 2-3 palabras en español",
    "design_rationale": "1 frase sobre por qué lo horizontal representa esta marca",
    "forma_escultorica": "disco_grueso",
    "forma_descripcion_prompt": "Single monolithic block of refined grey concrete — wide flat disc, 30cm diameter and only 3cm thick, sitting horizontally on its flat face. Extreme low horizontal proportions. no floating elements, all parts attached to base",
    "award_text": {"headline": "nombre del premio", "recipient": "nombre del premiado", "subtitle": "nombre organización"}
  },
  { "proposal_id": 2, ... },
  { "proposal_id": 3, ... }
]
Respond ONLY with the JSON array.
prompts.prompt_base_trofeo_lora: Studio product photography of a sculptural award trophy. Single monolithic sculptural form on neutral grey background #d7d7d7. Soft diffused studio lighting, clean contact shadow at base. Portrait orientation. No text, no letters, no numbers, no words, no markings anywhere on the surface. Sharp focus, clean composition, premium trophy photography.
prompts.prompt_textura_hormigon: This sculptural trophy has a smooth surface. Convert the material to authentic raw concrete: dense grey portland cement with visible fine aggregate particles, natural porosity, soft micro-roughness, matte non-reflective finish. Preserve the EXACT same shape — only change texture. No text, no logos, no new elements.
